title: Celebrate BlizzCon® 2026 With a Hoard of In-game Items
desc: [Announcement] Shop the BlizzCon Digital Bundles on Battle.net, available now through September 28.

title: StarCraft II 5.0.16b Hotfix Patch Notes
desc: [News] We are making changes for Patch 5.0.16 based on player data and feedback.

title: StarCraft II 5.0.16 Hotfix Patch Notes
desc: [News] We have made some adjustment for Patch 5.0.16 based on feedback and player data.

title: StarCraft II 5.0.16 Patch Notes
desc: [Patch Notes] Patch 5.0.16 has been released with map pool and economy updates, balance changes with expanding strategic variety across all three races, and overall quality of life improvements.

title: StarCraft II 5.0.16 PTR Update
desc: [News] We've added new and modified changes on PTR today. Check out the details here.

title: StarCraft II 5.0.16 PTR Patch Notes
desc: [News] Patch 5.0.16 has been pushed to PTR which features economy and balance changes with various bug fixes.

title: StarCraft II 5.0.15 Patch Notes

title: StarCraft II 5.0.15 PTR Update

title: StarCraft II 5.0.15 PTR Patch Notes

title: BlizzCon Returns In 2026
desc: [News] Our celebration of our universes, connection, and community is coming back to the Anaheim Convention Center next year.

title: StarCraft II 5.0.14 Patch Notes
desc: [News] We are pleased to release the final set of balance changes after several weeks of PTR testing.

title: StarCraft and StarCraft II have landed on Game Pass
desc: [News] We’re excited to welcome Game Pass members now joining us in the Koprulu Sector. While the entirety of the original StarCraft and StarCraft II’s multiplayer components are free-to-play, StarCraft: Remastered and StarCraft II: Campaign Collection are now available to anyone with a PC Game Pass or Game Pass Ultimate subscription.

title: StarCraft II 5.0.14 PTR Update
desc: [News] We would like make the adjustments for further testing. Check out the details here.

title: StarCraft II 5.0.14 PTR Patch Notes
desc: [News] We are happy to present the next major multiplayer balance update, featuring changes for 14 units and 10 buildings, as well as two new abilities.
